_comment: Sprint 22.5+ P0 hooks + Sprint 67 UserPromptSubmit hook (留尾 SSOT 治理) + Sprint 177 PostToolUse Bash hook (branch cleanup 自动化) + Sprint 178 SessionStart/Stop/PreToolUse Bash hooks (session 边界保护 + 危险命令拦截). 8 hooks. 详细: docs/AUTOMATION.md. Sprint 180 P0 配套 tests/test_claude_hooks.py 8 case 锁回归; 2 inline python regex bug (deep path + 裸 / 结尾) 留 Sprint 181 单独 sprint 治根 (跟 Sprint 179.1 跨 sprint 治本模式 stable).

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json, re; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read() or '{}'); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); bad = re.search(r'(?:^|/)(?:\.env|\.env\.local|\.env\.[^/]+\.local|data/processed/.*\.duckdb)(?:\$|/)', p); sys.exit(2 if bad else 0)"

python3 -c "
import sys, json, re
d = json.loads(sys.stdin.read() or '{}')
cmd = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
# Sprint 178: 拦截危险命令 (force push / rm -rf / mkfs / fork bomb)
forbidden = [
    r'\bgit\s+push\s+.*--force\b',
    r'\bgit\s+push\s+.*-f\b(?!or)',
    r'\brm\s+-rf?\s+/\b',
    r'\bmkfs\b',
    r':\(\)\s*\{\s*:\|:\s*&\s*\};:',
    r'\bdd\s+if=/dev/(zero|random|urandom)\s+of=/dev/(sda|nvme|disk)\b',
    r'\bchmod\s+-R\s+777\s+/\b',
]
for pat in forbidden:
    if re.search(pat, cmd):
        print(f'[Sprint 178 PreToolUse Bash] 危险命令拦截: {pat}')
        print(f'   command: {cmd[:200]}')
        sys.exit(2)
"

UserPromptSubmit.matcher: 剩余任务|留尾|backlog|todo|剩余待办
